---
title: "Ramayani_differential_abundance"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-18"
---

```{r}
library(ANCOMBC)
library(tidyverse)

set.seed(321)

ps = readRDS('../Datasets/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')

ps_glom = tax_glom(ps, 'Genus')

```

```{r}
output = ancombc2(ps_glom, rank = taxonomic_level,
          fix_formula = "Time_of_Collection_categorical",
          p_adj_method = "BH",
          prv_cut = 0.1 )

statistical_table = output$res
```

```{r}
taxa_to_plot = statistical_table %>%
  filter(diff_robust_Time_of_Collection_categorical30_days==T)

taxa_to_plot %>%
  ggplot(aes(taxon,lfc_Time_of_Collection_categorical30_days)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip()

# only 2 outputs at genus level
# only 2 outputs at the Family level
# only 2 outputs at the Order level
# none at class level
```
